## 🔍 Summary
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 🧭 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to...
2. Click on...
3. Scroll to...
4. See error...

## 🖼️ Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots or recordings.

What you expected to happen.

## 🧪 Actual Behavior
What actually happened.
